message:
test(e2e): wire Phase 5 recovery evidence logs + concurrent-mode assert

Adds Phase 5 (bd-1okty) instrumentation on top of the existing crash/
WAL replay scenario:

- New module constant PHASE5_RECOVERY_BEAD_ID = "bd-1okty" so grep
  across scenarios finds all Phase 5 evidence emitters.

- assert_recovered_rows_match_oracle now asserts that the recovered
  FrankenSQLite connection reports concurrent_mode_default == true.
  Recovery paths in previous revs accidentally flipped the default
  off in edge cases (e.g. when the WAL-replay-initiated Connection
  skipped the runtime defaults pass). AGENTS.md Rule
  concurrent_mode_default=true always requires this assertion at
  every connection boundary.

- New emit_phase5_recovery_log(scenario_id, extra) emitter that
  prints a structured PHASE5_RECOVERY_EVIDENCE JSON line with:
    bead_id, run_id, scenario_id, seed, replay_command, extra{
      row_count, expected_row_count,
      fsqlite_concurrent_mode_default,
      stock_sqlite_integrity_checked,
      logical_rows_match, storage_mode
    }
  Matches the existing emit_crash_replay_log shape so the external
  evidence-collecting job can unify both streams.

No scenario behaviour changes; purely instrumentation + one extra
assertion on an invariant that must already hold.
